experiences.title: Making/Hardware Hacking
experiences.subtitle: Hardware hacking is the modification of a device so it does something it wasn't designed to do. As a hobbyist, I enjoy tinkering with PCBs, microcontrollers (Arduino, ESP series) and single-board computers (Raspberry Pi) to build mods, add features, and experiment with new behaviors. I work on simple reverse engineering, low-level debugging, and rapid prototyping using Linux userland tools and mobile terminal environments like Termux.
